description: The On Locomotion Grip End node takes in a global reference from a user's PhysicalLocomotion. And fires when a grip ends that relates to that locomotion along with the data of the slot, position in 3D space, and what side of the user's grip it was.

fields.OnEvent: Fires when a locomotion grip ends.
fields.GrippedSlot: The slot that has been gripped.
fields.GrippedPoint: The point in 3D space where the grip has ended.
fields.GrippingHand: The side that has been gripped from a user.
